message: fix: repair codexbar and imsg formula imports

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +1,13 @@
 class Codexbar < Formula
   desc "Menu bar usage and status CLI"
   homepage "https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar"
+  url "https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/releases/download/v0.22/CodexBarCLI-v0.22-linux-x86_64.tar.gz"
   version "0.22"
+  sha256 "f330406c421eef7e9a0b199f0f1baeced12cffa206cbaf3be45f5d00def3d217"
   license "MIT"
 
+  depends_on :linux
+
   on_linux do
     if Hardware::CPU.arm?
       url "https://github.com/steipete/CodexBar/releases/download/v#{version}/CodexBarCLI-v#{version}-linux-aarch64.tar.gz"

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 class Imsg < Formula
   desc "Send and read iMessage / SMS from the terminal"
   homepage "https://github.com/steipete/imsg"
-  url "https://github.com/steipete/imsg/releases/download/v0.5.0/imsg-macos.zip"
-  sha256 "ae2ac967ef1e41fd046b74570f86c7ad69634a91846fec2d6cc76bb04b473c0a"
+  url "https://github.com/steipete/imsg/releases/download/v0.5.0/imsg-macos-v0.5.0.zip"
+  sha256 "fc7ac307ea227e0398f9ebf89a48586f6dcda800fcacbc689df28e9a0f5f4cba"
   license "MIT"
 
   # macOS Sonoma (14.0) or later required
